mapper.select: SELECT inquiry_id ,i.user_id , c.cat_id , i.inquiry_title , i.inquiry_content , i.inquiry_created_date , i.inquiry_answer_date , i.inquiry_status , i.inquiry_is_secret FROM movmov_cs_user_inquiries i, movmov_content_categories c WHERE c.cat_id = i.cat_id

SELECT inquiry_id , i.user_id , c.cat_id , i.inquiry_title , i.inquiry_content , i.inquiry_created_date , i.inquiry_answer_date , i.inquiry_status , i.inquiry_is_secret FROM movmov_cs_user_inquiries i, movmov_content_categories c WHERE c.cat_id = i.cat_id AND i.inquiry_id = #{inquiryId}

SELECT u.user_id, c.cat_id, i.inquiry_title, i.inquiry_content, i.inquiry_created_date, i.inquiry_answer_date, i.inquiry_status, i.inquiry_is_secret FROM movmov_cs_user_inquiries i JOIN movmov_content_categories c ON i.cat_id = c.cat_id JOIN movmov_users u ON u.user_id = i.user_id WHERE u.user_id = #{user_id}
